methodology.authority: Authenticated GitHub API inventory and direct repository-local inspection; indexes are navigation only.
methodology.evidence_pinning: Existing evidence remains at evidence_head_sha. current_head_sha/head_drift never move old line citations.
methodology.local_context: Every shard and the raw sanitized snapshot are checked in; no external crawler report is needed.
methodology.observation_window: The snapshot is a bounded, non-atomic observation window. Inventory and head request/response times are retained; each head applies at its own observed_at.

inspection.classification_evidence: Local-first Circle/Pocket Quest PWA with signed replicas, bounded protocol, verified BasicAgent sources, tests, and live workflow-backed Pages.
Canonical RAPP BasicAgent cartridge for a ROM-free local PyBoy/Copilot playthrough, with supervised runtime, tests, and explicit legal-content boundary.
Replayable synthetic RAPPterverse datasets/world-pack sources with schemas, deterministic generators, default-deny publication policy, scanners, tests, and live catalog Pages.
Implemented deterministic public-docs-subset Dynamics 365 simulator with generated OData fixtures, injected stateful twin runtime, tests, and live Pages.
Two-file MIT-licensed declaration for a proposed static Oracle Fusion Procurement simulator; no manifest, code, tests, workflow, or Pages implementation exists at the observed head.

post_window_drift.semantics: Movement after an earlier pinned inspection is recorded separately and does not rewrite that inspection.
